channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Potential No. 1 pick Cam Ward names several Titans players as best in league
item.description: Potential No. 1 pick Cam Ward seems like he has an idea which team will select him next week in the NFL Draft after naming several Titans as top players in the league.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Top WNBA draft pick Paige Bueckers announces investment stake in Unrivaled league
item.description: Unrivaled, a 3-on-3 pro women’s basketball league made it’s highly anticipated debut this past winter and was co-founded by WNBA stars by Breanna Stewart and Napheesa Collier.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: No comeback for Real Madrid as Arsenal is back in Champions League semifinals
item.description: MADRID (AP) — Arsenal defeated defending champion Real Madrid 2-1 on Wednesday to reach the Champions League semifinals for the first time since 2009 in a match where VAR played a key role in two penalty decisions.
item.dc:creator: TALES AZZONI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Where’s Justė Jocytė? Status of Valkyries’ top draft pick still unknown
item.description: Valkyries introduce rookies Shyanne Sellers, Kaitlyn Chen in Wednesday news conference, still waiting to hear from top pick Justė Jocytė.
item.dc:creator: Nathan Canilao, The Mercury News

item.title: PGA Tour suspends golfer indefinitely for participating in LIV Golf creator event
item.description: Wesley Bryan, who has played sporadically on the PGA Tour, was reportedly suspended indefinitely for participating in a LIV Golf creator event in Miami.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Justin Rose feeling 'tormented' after losing Masters in playoff again
item.description: Justin Rose was dealt another brutal playoff loss at the Masters Sunday when Rory McIlroy beat him, and he admitted feeling "tormented.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump administration sues Maine over participation of transgender athletes in girls sports
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Trump administration on Wednesday sued Maine for not complying with the government's push to ban transgender athletes in girls and women's sports, escalating a dispute over whether the state is abiding by a federal law that bars discrimination in education based on sex.
item.dc:creator: ALANNA DURKIN RICHER, ERIC TUCKER and PATRICK WHITTLE, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: White Sox DFA Mike Clevinger, call-up Steven Wilson from AAA
item.description: The Chicago White Sox have designated Mike Clevinger for assignment and called up reliever Steven Wilson from Triple-A, while Wilson remains on the 40-man roster.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Scottie Scheffler explains awkward Masters green jacket exchange with Rory McIlroy
item.description: Scottie Scheffler wanted Rory McIlroy to have his moments on Sunday after the PGA Tour star completed the career grand slam when he won the Masters in a one-hole playoff.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Anthony, Magic claim 7th seed with 120-95 win over Hawks in Play-In Tournament
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Cole Anthony came off the bench with 26 points and six assists to lead the Orlando Magic to a 120-95 win over the Atlanta Hawks on Tuesday night in the first game of the Play-In Tournament.
item.dc:creator: DICK SCANLON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cubs demote Shaw, Pearson to minors, call up Little, Palencia
item.description: The Chicago Cubs have demoted infield prospect Matt Shaw and relief pitcher Nate Pearson to Triple-A and recalled pitchers Luke Little and Daniel Palencia from the Iowa Cubs, while reinstating Vidal Bruján and moving relief pitcher Eli Morgan to the 15-day IL with a right elbow impingement.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Professional soccer could be headed to the North Bay
item.description: (KRON) -- The next professional sports team in the Bay Area could be bound for the North Bay. The City of Santa Rosa announced it has entered into exclusive negotiations with the United Soccer League (USL) to explore the possibilities of bringing both a men's team and a women's team to the city.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Rory McIlroy has the Masters and a Grand Slam. That gives him freedom to chase more
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — The Mount Rushmore of golf now has six faces carved into granite, and for that Rory McIlroy should feel as though he achieved the highest pinnacle in golf. But there is so much more ahead for McIlroy.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Crochet is still Crochet, even if Red now precedes 'Sox' on the front of his jersey
item.description: Garrett Crochet, the former White Sox pitcher, made his debut for the Boston Red Sox on Sunday, shutting down the Chicago White Sox with 11 strikeouts and one run. Despite the trade, Crochet has expressed his fondness for his former team and the memories he made on Chicago's South Side.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Vance fumbles Ohio State's NCAA football championship trophy as Buckeyes visit the White House
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Vice President JD Vance ended the Ohio State football team's visit to the White House on Monday by fumbling the team's national championship trophy.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Palou finally loses as IndyCar champ's 2-race winning streak snapped by Kirkwood in Long Beach
item.description: Kyle Kirkwood showed that Alex Palou can be beat this IndyCar season and returned Andretti Global to the top of the podium with his second career victory at the Grand Prix of Long Beach.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utah scores four power play goals in 5-3 victory
item.description: DALLAS (AP) - Logan Cooley had a goal and two assists to lead the Utah Hockey Club to a 5-3 win against the Dallas Stars at American Airlines Center on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Rowdies lose homecoming matchup, but stadium comeback brings hope
item.description: For the first time in seven months, Rowdies fans are finally back home at Al Lang Stadium after the waterfront venue was impacted during back-to-back hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: Georgia McCarthur, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Rory McIlroy has masterful start at Augusta and closes in on career Grand Slam
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — The greatest start in the 91-year history of the Masters wasn't enough for Rory McIlroy. He delivered what looked to be a haymaker late Saturday afternoon, a 6-iron so majestic and pure that he walked 10 yards before he saw it land 6 feet away for eagle on the 15th hole.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Thunder crush Jazz in home finale, 145-111
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - The Utah Jazz home finale was pretty representative of the entire season. The Jazz got blown out by the Oklahoma City Thunder.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Local golf club students attend The Masters for first time
item.description: It was a beautiful Friday for the second round of The Masters, and some middle schoolers got to attend the tournament for the first time.
item.dc:creator: Brad Means, Fox 5

item.title: Like father, like son: Shoei Darvish steps on the hill for Dons
item.description: With a flurry of pitches, Shoei Darvish showed the skills that we've already seen in Petco Park from his father. But make no mistake, this junior righty is doing it on his terms - but with some talented influence.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5

item.title: Jazz end 9-game skid with overtime win over Blazers
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In what has been an insufferable season for Utah Jazz fans, the team gave them a treat Wednesday night -- a thrilling overtime victory.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
